error: Worker process crashed or was killed: A process in the process pool was terminated abruptly while the future was running or pending.. This may be due to device access issues, memory problems, or other system-level errors.
summary: Directly sending a 3D ConvTranspose1d tensor and raw std::vector attrs into aclnnConvolution can crash the runtime worker. Fix by wrapping stride/padding/output_padding as at::IntArrayRef and routing the op through the stable 2D transposed-convolution path with x.unsqueeze(2), weight.unsqueeze(2), a [N,C,1,L] output tensor, then squeeze(2) back to 1D.
